title: polypodium excaudatum
intro: Polypodium excaudatum, also known as Polypodium decumanum, is a type of fern plant native to India and Southeast Asia. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are thought to make it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and ease digestive issues. Polypodium excaudatum is often prepared for medicinal use in the form of a decoction, where the leaves and stems are boiled in water to release their active compounds.
